Class SemanticPrivacyGuard

java.lang.Object
com.semanticprivacyguard.SemanticPrivacyGuard
public final class SemanticPrivacyGuard extends Object
Semantic Privacy Guard — primary public API.

Acts as a lightweight, high-performance AI privacy firewall that intercepts text, identifies PII using a hybrid heuristic + Naive Bayes ML approach, and redacts it before it leaves the corporate network.

Quick start

// 1. Create with defaults
SemanticPrivacyGuard spg = SemanticPrivacyGuard.create();

// 2. Redact
RedactionResult result = spg.redact(
    "Please email John Doe at john.doe@acme.com or call (555) 123-4567. " +
    "His SSN is 123-45-6789."
);

System.out.println(result.getRedactedText());
// → "Please email [PERSON_NAME_1] [PERSON_NAME_2] at [EMAIL_1] or call [PHONE_1].
//    His SSN is [SSN_1]."

System.out.println(result.getMatchCount()); // → 5

Custom configuration

SPGConfig config = SPGConfig.builder()
    .redactionMode(RedactionMode.MASK)
    .mlConfidenceThreshold(0.75)
    .minimumSeverity(6)
    .build();

SemanticPrivacyGuard spg = SemanticPrivacyGuard.create(config);

Stream / large-file processing

// Constant heap usage regardless of file size — one line at a time
StreamRedactionSummary s =
    spg.redactPath(Path.of("server.log"), Path.of("server.clean.log"));

System.out.println(s);
// → StreamRedactionSummary[lines=84231, linesWithPII=312, matches=389, timeMs=740]

Thread safety

All instances are thread-safe and designed for use with Java 17+ virtual threads (Project Loom). A single shared instance can safely handle millions of concurrent redaction calls with negligible overhead.

Since:
1.0.0
Author:
Hemant Naik

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<PIIMatch>
    analyse(String text)
    Returns only the detected matches without applying redaction.
    boolean
    containsPII(String text)
    Convenience method: scans text and returns true if any PII above the configured minimum severity is detected.
    static SemanticPrivacyGuard

    Creates a new instance with default configuration.
    static SemanticPrivacyGuard

    Creates a new instance with the supplied configuration.

    getConfig()
    Returns the active configuration for this instance.
    RedactionResult
    redact(String text)
    Scans text for PII and returns a full RedactionResult containing the sanitised text, all detected matches, and (optionally) a reverse-lookup map.
    StreamRedactionSummary
    redactPath(Path inputFile, Path outputFile)
    Convenience method: redacts a file on disk and writes the result to another file, processing line-by-line with constant heap usage.
    StreamRedactionSummary
    redactStream(InputStream in, OutputStream out)
    Convenience method: redacts an InputStream line-by-line and writes the sanitised output to out, both streams treated as UTF-8.
    StreamRedactionSummary
    redactStream(Reader reader, Writer writer)
    Convenience method: redacts a character stream line-by-line.

    Returns a StreamProcessor configured identically to this instance.

  • Field Details

    • VERSION

      public static final String VERSION
      Library version, aligned with pom.xml.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

  • Method Details

    • create

      public static SemanticPrivacyGuard create()
      Creates a new instance with default configuration.
      Returns:
      a ready-to-use SemanticPrivacyGuard

    • create

      public static SemanticPrivacyGuard create(SPGConfig config)
      Creates a new instance with the supplied configuration.
      Parameters:
      config - custom configuration (never null)
      Returns:
      a ready-to-use SemanticPrivacyGuard

    • redact

      public RedactionResult redact(String text)
      Scans text for PII and returns a full RedactionResult containing the sanitised text, all detected matches, and (optionally) a reverse-lookup map.
      Parameters:
      text - the raw input text (may be null or blank)
      Returns:
      a RedactionResult; if the input is null or blank, returns a result wrapping the original text with no matches

    • containsPII

      public boolean containsPII(String text)
      Convenience method: scans text and returns true if any PII above the configured minimum severity is detected.

      This is faster than redact(String) when you only need a yes/no answer (e.g. a pre-flight check before logging).

      Parameters:
      text - the text to scan
      Returns:
      true if PII was found

    • analyse

      public List<PIIMatch> analyse(String text)
      Returns only the detected matches without applying redaction. Useful for audit / reporting pipelines where the original text must be preserved but a list of findings is required.
      Parameters:
      text - the text to analyse
      Returns:
      unmodifiable list of detected PII matches

    • getConfig

      public SPGConfig getConfig()
      Returns the active configuration for this instance.

    • streamProcessor

      public StreamProcessor streamProcessor()
      Returns a StreamProcessor configured identically to this instance.

      Use the returned processor when you need to redact large files or byte/character streams without loading the entire content into memory. Processing is line-by-line with constant heap usage regardless of document size.

      StreamProcessor proc = spg.streamProcessor();

// Redact a 500 MB log file with a small, stable heap footprint
StreamRedactionSummary s =
    proc.redact(Path.of("big.log"), Path.of("big.clean.log"));
      Returns:
      a new StreamProcessor sharing this instance's configuration

    • redactStream

      public StreamRedactionSummary redactStream(InputStream in, OutputStream out) throws IOException
      Convenience method: redacts an InputStream line-by-line and writes the sanitised output to out, both streams treated as UTF-8.

      Both streams are left open; the caller is responsible for closing them. Equivalent to streamProcessor().redact(in, out).

      Parameters:
      in - the source byte stream (never null)
      out - the output byte stream (never null)
      Returns:
      aggregated StreamRedactionSummary for the full document
      Throws:
      IOException - if any I/O error occurs

    • redactStream

      public StreamRedactionSummary redactStream(Reader reader, Writer writer) throws IOException
      Convenience method: redacts a character stream line-by-line.

      Both streams are left open; the caller is responsible for closing them. Equivalent to streamProcessor().redact(reader, writer).

      Parameters:
      reader - the source character stream (never null)
      writer - the output character stream (never null)
      Returns:
      aggregated StreamRedactionSummary for the full document
      Throws:
      IOException - if any I/O error occurs

    • redactPath

      public StreamRedactionSummary redactPath(Path inputFile, Path outputFile) throws IOException
      Convenience method: redacts a file on disk and writes the result to another file, processing line-by-line with constant heap usage.

      Equivalent to streamProcessor().redact(inputFile, outputFile).

      Parameters:
      inputFile - path of the file to redact (must be readable)
      outputFile - path of the output file (created or overwritten)
      Returns:
      aggregated StreamRedactionSummary for the full document
      Throws:
      IOException - if either file cannot be opened or an I/O error occurs
